# https://dkountanis.xyz llms.txt

- [Dimitris Kountanis](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/): VP of Product Engineering at Native Teams. Building the future of work and utilizing AI to the maximum of its abilities. A curated corner of his mind on product, engineering, and AI.
- [Blog](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/blog): Thoughts on agentic engineering, AI-native teams, product development, and building in public.
- [Work](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/work): From front-end engineer to VP of Product Engineering at Native Teams. AI-native leadership, agentic engineering, and scaling teams.
- [Consulting & Technical Advisory](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/consulting): Consulting services for startups - AI integration, MVPs, and scaling engineering teams.
- [Build in Public](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/build-in-public): Side projects and experiments. Avrae (AI visibility monitoring, ongoing), HeyThatAd and WhoIsAt (abandoned).
- [I Haven't Written Code in a Year](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/blog/agentic-engineering): On agentic engineering, trusting the models, and why the gap between early adopters and laggards is about to become irreversible.
- [WhoIsAt](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/blog/building-whoisat): Built a tool to enrich event guest lists with AI agents. It worked. Then killed it. Lessons learned.
- [Trunk-Based Development](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/blog/trunk-based-development-bet): Moving away from release cycles to trunk-based development for faster, safer delivery.
- [HeyThatAd Launch](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/blog/heythatad-launch): Vibe-coded a creative ad generator in a weekend with Cursor, Supabase, and Next.js.
- [Storybook and Next.js](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/blog/storybook-implementation): How Storybook supercharged the migration to Next.js at Native Teams.
- [Boosting PageSpeed](https://www.dkountanis.xyz/blog/boost-pagespeed): How Native Teams improved PageSpeed scores from 40s to 90+.
